TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Gjorge Ivanov == ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 5, Gjorge Ivanov, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1960) mrhuw Macedonia ta' misuw hya' ga Gjorge Ivanov, aring ryax tay 12 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. His second and the last presidential term ended on 12 May 2019. qnxan Maja Ivanova ga, kneril ni Gjorge Ivanov. Gjorge Ivanov sa kawas 2009, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi.
S.PHON: == …£jor…£e i*ano* == rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, …£jor…£e i*ano*, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ma ¶~ ®e*onia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a …£jor…£e i*ano*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ńßis~…ē s~…ēe ¶~ ®on* an* tńße las~…ēt pres~…ēi*ential term en*e* on ** maj ****. qnxan maja i*ano*a …£a, kneril ni …£jor…£e i*ano*. …£jor…£e i*ano* s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, t ĒariŇč mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~…ēezi.
S.FORM: == Gjorge Ivanov == ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 5, Gjorge Ivanov, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1960) mrhuw Macedonia ta' misuw hya' ga Gjorge Ivanov, aring ryax tay 12 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. His second and the last presidential term ended on 12 May 2019. qnxan Maja Ivanova ga, kneril ni Gjorge Ivanov. Gjorge Ivanov sa kawas 2009, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi.
S.PHON: == …£jor…£e i*ano* == rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, …£jor…£e i*ano*, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ma ¶~ ®e*onia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a …£jor…£e i*ano*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ńßis~…ē s~…ēe ¶~ ®on* an* tńße las~…ēt pres~…ēi*ential term en*e* on ** maj ****. qnxan maja i*ano*a …£a, kneril ni …£jor…£e i*ano*. …£jor…£e i*ano* s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, t ĒariŇč mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~…ēezi.
